Đặc biệt, đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây nhận được điểm số 8.7, phản ánh sự tận tâm và chu đáo trong phục vụ, giúp tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ cho mỗi du khách. Với vị trí thuận lợi và dịch vụ xuất sắc, Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area xứng đáng là lựa chọn hàng đầu cho chuyến hành trình khám phá vùng Napa Valley.

sample_comments.text:
It's super hard when you like the staff, the room looks good, and then other guests go and ruin things by their disrespectful behavior. 
The nighttime manager said it best when he said, you'll never change those people. It all comes down to how people are raised. Because of the price, and more likely because of the location, disrespectful people were there partying right outside my room, setting off the smoke alarm at 10:45 PM. When the manager asked them to turn it off, they went upstairs and started tromping back and forth. 

I did not feel Safe and promptly checked out at 6:45 AM before the party makers woke up. I went to another chain hotel for $50 more and all was safe and respectful.

Facilities are adequate and contribute to overall comfort, providing good value without any major drawbacks.

sample_comments.title: AWFUL UNPLEASANT FELT VERY UNEASY AND UNSAFE.
sample_comments.positives: The room was okay it had a horrible stench of old cigarettes, even though I specifically asked for a room that was non smoking.
sample_comments.negatives: The staff was ODD. I was checked in at the front by a woman and she had her newborn with her everything was fine. Until about around 5AM I was woken up by loud banging on my door I look over to the door and notice it was unlocked but I had the door stopper put in place. I immediately jumped out of bed to see what the commotion was. It was hotel front desk a man telling me that the room was supposed to be vacant and nobody should have been inside and I said I had paid for it and was given the room key earlier that night. And I had asked if he knew why my door was unlocked it's because he tried to enter the room while I was asleep. I went to the front with him to sort this out I was very upset as I drove over 7 hours to get to that hotel. I was so tired and to be disturbed over this was just not pleasant at all. When we went to the front is when he had told me about a note the woman from the night that had checked me in wrote "KEEP AN EYE ON ROOM 127 MAKE SURE TO CHECK ROOM" and I could tell that she wrote it bc it matched the handwriting with the key card she gave me. There was no recollection of me being checked into the room at all because apparently she forgot to put it in the system or so the front desk guy said. Over all it was one of the scariest strangest experiences I've had at any motel/hotel and I've been to several and I mean SEVERAL and this has never happened to me before I have pics of the note she wrote and my keycard with the same writing.

sample_comments.title: It reeked of marijuana and we had loud drunk/high man and woman screaming all night long and literally pounding on o

sample_comments.text: Rooms are nice. If you close and lock the door, you can almost forget where you are located. They got waffles!

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: the staff was awful. We waited 30 minutes while the couple in front of us got checked in. I don't know why it took forever. The guy then started to help us. We were there for about 20 minutes. He took our IDs etc. then another lady comes in and they start doing shift change. He talks to her for about 15 minutes updating her and just leaves us standing there then he leaves without saying a word. The lady then takes over starts our whole process again. She asks if we want a downstairs or upstairs. We say downstairs. She says ok. She finishes checking us in and ended up giving us two upstairs rooms. We have a grandmother in a wheelchair which cannot go upstairs. So she then looks for more rooms. Finds us two rooms downstairs right next to each other which is perfect. She apologized for everything said she would get us an early check in by 2:30 and would call us when it was ready. She never called us and by 3 oclock which is check in time, our rooms still hadn't been touched by house keeping and we're still completely dirty from whoever was in the room last. I had a tweeker above me who was up all night banging and stomping on the floor. Kept me up all night. Had weirdos walking up and down and you can hear them talking to themselves outside your door. Worst experience ever! The only good thing was once the room was cleaned it was very nice. Spacious, clean, comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Disaster City
sample_comments.negatives: Where do I begin? Upon my arrival, the woman who greeted me was anything but friendly. If she'd smiled her face would have cracked and I tried to soften her but nothing worked. She was just sour. This was an older woman who didn't belong in a position of greeting new customers. She gave me the wrong room and when I went back to get it corrected she insisted that I didn't have a room with 2 queen beds but one with a king. There were 3 people. We needed 2 beds. I went back to the room and called corporate and they straightened it out. Next she put us in a room with 2 queen beds and when I walked in I couldn't believe what I was seeing. The bedspreads looked like someone had peed on them and the chair in the corner looked the same. I tore off the bedspreads and threw them outside and did the same with the chair. We didn't walk on the carpets without shoes. I was afraid of bedbugs or other creatures. My room was non-refundable or I would have left. The breakfast was a joke. Cereal, waffles, /orange juice, and coffee. No eggs or meat of any kind. Worst selection of any motel I've stayed at and I've stayed at lots. Never again.

sample_comments.title: Skip, don't come here
sample_comments.positives: Quality Inn wants $150 cash deposit OR to charge your card $150 and keep it for a week. They have your card on file. I don't see the purpose of this and it is a very big inconvenience. This is in a bad part of town. My non-smoking room stinks like weed. The curtains are torn. The toilet seat is a mismatch for the toilet, very uncomfortable. This is a cheap place but it's not worth it. There are homeless outside. I tried to cancel, but they wouldn't let me without charging me the full price.
sample_comments.negatives: The deposit. I will never stay in another Quality Inn as long as I live. This is an extraordinarily subpar motel. I didn't expect this from Quality Inn but now I know better.

sample_comments.title: Updated rooms!
sample_comments.text: Nice updated rooms. The surrounding area has a lot of homeless outside. Good value at least.

sample_comments.title: Neighborhood was decent.
sample_comments.negatives: First off I didn't like there was a 100.00 deposit fee that booking .com dosent tell you about. You find out the day you check in at the front desk.....the room smelled like straight up dogs. Flies were all in the room. The carpet was wet. There was a big red stain on the carpet ( wasn't sure if it was juice or blood). When I stripped the bed there was brown and red stains on the mattress.

sample_comments.title: Love it
sample_comments.text: Great place

sample_comments.title: I question the 2&1/2 stars it had on booking.com. It is more like 1-star.
sample_comments.negatives: $150 incidentals fee immediately charged uon check-in, refund allegedly comes several days after checkout. Signs posted all over the check-in lobby about fees for this and fees for that, including prices charged for stolen linens, and so on. I felt like I was entering a high security prison, accentuated by the huge plexiglass screen completely surrounding the check-in desk, Is this hotel located in a high-crime area? The bath sink does not fit the counter top. It was mounted close to, but not directly to, the counter top. The remaining half inch gap between sink and counter was filled with silicone sealer that was peeling away, leaving holes, and it was dirty. The sink faucet was loose in the counter top. The carpet had been recently cleaned and was still wet in spots. When walking from the carpet onto the tile floor in the bath the first time, the soles of my shoes were wet and I did not realize that. I slipped on the tile floor and nearly fell down. Breakfast consisted of three options - waffle mix in a pouch to be used in questionable waffle irons, two kinds of children's cereal, and a bowl with a few apples. No eggs, no bread of any kind, The orange juice was watery thin. The entire hotel spoke of cheap owners excessively cutting corners everywhere they could. The only upside was that the bed was actually comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Small Family stay

Khách Sạn Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area - Nơi Dừng Chân Lý Tưởng Tại Fairfield, CA

Tọa lạc tại trung tâm Fairfield, California, Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area là một khách sạn 2.5 sao lý tưởng cho những ai tìm kiếm sự thoải mái và tiện nghi trong một không gian thân thiện. Với 54 phòng nghỉ được thiết kế hiện đại và ấm cúng, khách sạn mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm lưu trú dễ chịu và thư giãn. Dù bạn là một gia đình đang tìm kiếm một nơi nghỉ ngơi hay một nhóm bạn bè muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của Napa Valley, Quality Inn sẽ là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho bạn.

Khách sạn mở cửa đón tiếp từ 03:00 PM và yêu cầu trả phòng trước 11:00 AM, giúp bạn có đủ thời gian để tận hưởng những tiện ích tại đây. Đặc biệt, chính sách trẻ em của khách sạn rất thân thiện, cho phép trẻ em từ 3 đến 18 tuổi được lưu trú miễn phí, mang đến sự thuận lợi cho các gia đình khi du lịch. Hãy đến và trải nghiệm sự chào đón nồng nhiệt cùng dịch vụ tận tình tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area, nơi mà mỗi khoảnh khắc đều đáng nhớ!

Cơ Sở Vật Chất Thể Thao Tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area

Tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm những tiện nghi thể thao tuyệt vời, giúp nâng cao sức khỏe và mang lại sự thư giãn sau những ngày dài khám phá vùng Napa Valley. Khách sạn tự hào sở hữu hai hồ bơi tuyệt đẹp: một hồ bơi trong nhà và một hồ bơi ngoài trời, đáp ứng nhu cầu đa dạng của mọi du khách.

Hồ bơi trong nhà mang đến một không gian yên tĩnh, lý tưởng cho những ai muốn bơi lội trong một môi trường thoải mái, bất kể thời tiết bên ngoài. Cả hai hồ bơi đều được bảo trì tốt, sạch sẽ và an toàn, đảm bảo mang lại trải nghiệm bơi lội tuyệt vời cho tất cả mọi người.

Tiện Nghi Đáng Chú Ý Tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area

Tại Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area, việc di chuyển trở nên dễ dàng và thuận tiện hơn bao giờ hết nhờ vào các tiện nghi giao thông tuyệt vời. Quality Inn Fairfield Napa Valley Area - khách sạn 2.5 sao tại Fairfield (CA).
Địa chỉ: 2170 N Texas St, North Fairfield, Fairfield (CA), Hoa Kỳ.
Hãy để chuyến đi của quý khách có một khởi đầu tuyệt vời khi ở lại khách sạn này, nơi có Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại North Fairfield của Fairfield (CA), chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Bể bơi ngoài trời và phòng tập là một trong những tiện nghi đặc biệt sẽ nâng cao kỳ nghỉ của quý khách với sự tiện lợi ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bình chữa cháy, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bữa sáng [miễn phí], Bữa sáng [tự chọn], CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ giặt là, Dịch vụ phòng, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giãn cách vật lý ít nhất 1 mét, Giặt đồ vải lanh và quần áo bằng nước nóng, Giữ hành lý, Internet, Khu vực hút thuốc, Không hút thuốc, Khử trùng hằng ngày trong tất cả các phòng, Lò vi sóng, Màn bảo vệ ở khu vực chung, Máy bán hàng tự động, Máy pha trà/cà phê, Máy sưởi ở khu vực chung, Máy điều hòa ở khu vực chung, Nhân viên đeo khẩu trang.
Điểm đánh giá 8.0/10 dựa trên 112 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Độ sạch sẽ, Địa điểm, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Nhận phòng, Thiết kế phòng, Kích thước phòng, Đáng tiền.
Các loại phòng: 1 Giường Lớn, Cấm Hút Thuốc (1 King Bed, Nonsmoking); Suite có Giường cỡ Queen - Không hút thuốc (Queen Suite - Non-Smoking); Phòng có 1 Giường Lớn - Cấm Hút Thuốc, Phù Hợp cho Người Khuyết Tật (1 King Bed, Nonsmoking, Accessible); Phòng có 2 giường Queen, Không hút thuốc (2 Queen Beds, Nonsmoking); Suite Có Giường Cỡ King - Không Hút Thuốc (King Suite - Non-Smoking); Suite with Two Queen Beds - Non-Smoking; STANDARD ROOM,2 QUEEN BEDS,NON SMOKING (Standard Room,2 Queen Beds,Non Smoking); Suite có Giường cỡ Queen - Không hút thuốc (Queen Suite - Non-Smoking).
Gần: Solano Town Center, Driven Raceway, Suisun-Fairfield Amtrak Station, Allan Witt Park, Patina Home and Garden, Paradise Valley Golf Course.
